headline: NU E Power Corp. Launches New Corporate Website, Releases Updated Investor Presentation and Provides Business Strategy Overview
summary: Calgary, Alberta--(Newsfile Corp. - April 8, 2026) - NU E Power Corp. (CSE: NUE) (OTC Pink: NUEPF) ("NUE" or the "Company") today announced the launch of its newly redesigned corporate website, the availability of an updated corporate investor presentation, and provides the following overview of its business strategy and near-term priorities.New Corporate Website & MaterialsConcurrently with the release of an updated corporate presentation, NUE has launched a redesigned corporate website, now...

headline: Shares of base metal companies are trading higher amid easing energy costs and a weaker U.S. dollar in response to the U.S.-Iran ceasefire agreement and President Trump's social media post that signaled a de-escalation of regional conflict and supply-chain disruption.
summary: Shares of base metal companies are trading higher amid easing energy costs and a weaker U.S. dollar in response to the U.S.-Iran ceasefire agreement and President Trump's social media post that signaled a de-escalation of regional conflict and supply-chain disruption.
